title: Oracle Fusion Engagement Cloud Training
description:
Oracle Fusion Engagement Cloud training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle Fusion Engagement Cloud training as per your pace.

Oracle Engagement Cloud is a tool that provides a huge set of abilities that support the users to move smoothly from sales planning and execution to customer onboarding, support services, multi-channel interactions and account management which mainly focuses on driving performance and connecting business processes. Oracle Engagement Cloud Service Foundation is the supporting structure for connected service experiences, permitting your teams to offer exceptional experiences by streamlining interactions, providing a complete 360° view of the customer and enabling cooperation between sales and service professionals. It provides a powerful and strong sales and services capabilities that are built together on a single platform.  It helps the sales team know the customer better, check related content, to become profitable, inspect team performance, forecast, and campaign aggressively. This tool can be used in any industry such as Retail Banking, Corporate Banking, Insurance, Hospitality, Wealth Management, and High-Tech Manufacturing.

·         It provides seamless service request management.
